entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The primary pulse crop studied for heat tolerance.

entities.name: DRY BEANS
entities.description: A pulse crop mentioned for global importance comparison.

entities.name: HEAT STRESS
entities.description: High temperature environments (35 °C and above) that negatively impact crop growth.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity in genetic characteristics within the chickpea population.

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A population of F8–9 lines derived from a cross between heat sensitive and heat tolerant parents.

entities.name: ICC 4567
entities.description: A heat sensitive chickpea line used as a parent in the RIL population.

entities.name: ICC 15614
entities.description: A heat tolerant chickpea line used as a parent in the RIL population.

entities.name: ICRISAT PATANCHERU INDIA
entities.description: The field location where the chickpea RILs were evaluated.

entities.name: ALPHA LATTICE DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used for the field evaluation with three replications.

entities.name: NUMBER OF FILLED PODS
entities.description: A heat responsive trait measured to assess yield components.

entities.name: TOTAL NUMBER OF SEEDS
entities.description: A heat responsive trait that acts as a major direct contributor to grain yield.

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: A trait measured to assess the efficiency of biomass partition to grain.

entities.name: PERCENT POD SETTING
entities.description: The trait most affected by high temperatures in the studied population.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The primary productivity trait used to evaluate heat tolerance.

entities.name: 100-SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A trait measured as seed mass, found to be the least affected by heat stress.

entities.name: MIXED MODEL ANALYSIS OF VARIANCE
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine GCV, PCV, and heritability.

entities.name: GENOTYPIC COEFFICIENT OF VARIATION
entities.description: A metric used to estimate the genetic variability of traits.

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC COEFFICIENT OF VARIATION
entities.description: A metric used to estimate the phenotypic variability of traits.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation attributable to genetic factors.

entities.name: CORRELATION STUDIES
entities.description: Statistical analysis used to find associations between different traits.

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COMPONENT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A dimensionality reduction method used to reveal associations among traits.

entities.name: PATH ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine direct and indirect effects of traits on grain yield.

entities.name: HEAT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of chickpea cultivars to maintain productivity under high temperature conditions.
